dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome to ShiftFlow. Manage your team schedules below.
dashboard.step1: Go to Staff and add your team members
dashboard.step2: Go to Schedules, create a period, and click Generate with AI
dashboard.step3: Review the schedule, make manual tweaks if needed, then Publish
dashboard.step4: Share the Telegram bot link with your staff so they can send shift preferences

staff.title: Staff
staff.name: Name
staff.noStaffYet: No staff yet. Add your first team member above.

analytics.title: Hours Analytics
analytics.name: Name
analytics.noSchedulesYet: No schedules generated yet — create one in AI Copilot first.
analytics.selectSchedule: Select a schedule above to see the hours report.

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.demoSubtitle: Beach Bar · 07 Jul – 03 Aug 2026 · AI generated · ✅ 0 BAD sequences
schedules.summaryLine: ✅ Every week: 2×8h + 2×10h + 3×12h  ·  12h shifts only Fri/Sat/Sun  ·  0 BAD sequences  ·  Reward sequence: W1=Djedaya, W2=Vasil, W3=Niki, W4=Aphrodite
schedules.label: Label (e.g. July 2026)
schedules.noScheduleYet: No schedule yet. Create a period and generate with AI.

preferences.title: Staff Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Pending requests from staff via Telegram, WhatsApp, Viber, or the web app.
preferences.noPending: No pending preferences. When staff send requests via bot, they appear here.

copilot.title: AI Copilot
copilot.subtitle: Describe your shift rules in natural language — AI translates them into verifiable rules, the solver builds the schedule.
copilot.demoNotice: AI Copilot requires a real account — demo mode only shows the sample schedule.
copilot.briefPlaceholder: Paste the brief here — e.g. "Create a monthly schedule for 4 bartenders… each week 2×8h + 2×10h + 3×12h…"
copilot.chatPlaceholder: e.g. "Why does Aphrodite close 3 weekends?" or "Add: nobody works more than 5 days in a row"
copilot.emptyGridNotice: The schedule appears here after generation.

home.badge: AI-Powered · Zero Setup · Works on Any Device
home.heroSubtitle: Generate constraint-satisfying work schedules in seconds. Staff submit preferences via Telegram. Export to PDF or Excel. No installation — just open your browser.

features.title: AI Schedule Generator
features.desc: OR-Tools constraint solver generates gap-free schedules in seconds, respecting shift quotas, rest rules, and weekend rotation.

features.title: Telegram Preferences
features.desc: Staff message the bot: "I can't work Friday" and Claude AI parses it. Manager approves with one click.

features.title: Hours Analytics
features.desc: Track total hours per employee weekly and monthly. Spot overtime before it happens. Export reports to CSV.

features.title: PDF & Excel Export
features.desc: One click to generate a print-ready A4 landscape schedule with color coding — exactly like a hand-made Excel.

features.title: Manual Override
features.desc: Swap individual shifts after generation. Re-trigger verification to check constraint satisfaction.

features.title: Secure & Multi-tenant
features.desc: Each venue is fully isolated. Staff see only their own schedule. All data encrypted in transit and at rest.
